strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, well above the 6-year requirement
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing library author, workshop instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and Vitest/Playwright are not mentioned despite deep general testing expertise
React exposure appears limited to one role; much frontend history is Ember.js
Significant investment in DLang, a niche language outside the target stack; Python and Kotlin are absent

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of fullstack TypeScript/Node experience
Gaps in primary-stack specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, React depth)

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with a long fullstack track record in TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB/MySQL, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes, plus current hands-on AI agent infrastructure work — the hardest requirement to source. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, testing tools authorship, teaching) align well with code-review and quality responsibilities. The gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest, deeper React) rather than conceptual, and someone with this testing and polyglot background should close them quickly.
